etn 3.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Explore acoustic telemetry data
    • Configure credentials
    • Options
  • Changelog

List all available acoustic project codes

Source: R/list_acoustic_project_codes.R
list_acoustic_project_codes.Rd

List all available acoustic project codes

Usage

list_acoustic_project_codes(connection)

Arguments

connection

A connection to the ETN database. This argument is no longer used. You will be prompted for credentials instead.

Value

A vector of all unique project_code of type = "acoustic" in project.sql.

Examples

list_acoustic_project_codes()
#>   [1] "2004_Gudena"                    "2011_bovenschelde"             
#>   [3] "2011_Loire"                     "2011_Warnow"                   
#>   [5] "2013_Foyle"                     "2013_Maas"                     
#>   [7] "2014_Frome"                     "2014_Nene"                     
#>   [9] "2015_PhD_Gutmann_Roberts"       "2016_Diaccia_Botrona"          
#>  [11] "2017_Fremur"                    "2020_PhD_Winter"               
#>  [13] "2021_YEELAZ"                    "2022_Beaver_Durme"             
#>  [15] "2023_meuse_Lith_Linne"          "2024_Anguilla_bb_Harlingen"    
#>  [17] "2024_BECO_IIM_RIAVIGO"          "2024_bovenschelde"             
#>  [19] "2024-2031_Northsea_Ecowende"    "2025_IJmuidenRotterdam_array"  
#>  [21] "2025_langsdammen_array"         "2025_Nederrijn_Lek_array"      
#>  [23] "2025-2026_RijnWest_array"       "2025-28_NorthSeaNL_MONS_array" 
#>  [25] "2026_PhD_Visser_network"        "Aberdeen"                      
#>  [27] "albert"                         "Albertkanaal_VPS_Ham"          
#>  [29] "Albertkanaal_VPS_Hasselt"       "Apelafico"                     
#>  [31] "ARAISOLA02"                     "ARAISOLA03"                    
#>  [33] "Ars"                            "Artevigo"                      
#>  [35] "ASMOP1"                         "ASMOP2"                        
#>  [37] "AZO"                            "BALANCE"                       
#>  [39] "BECORV"                         "BlueCrab2022Algarve"           
#>  [41] "BOATS_network"                  "Bodden_Pike"                   
#>  [43] "BOOGMR"                         "BOOPAP"                        
#>  [45] "BOOPIRATA"                      "BOORAMA"                       
#>  [47] "BOOSBI"                         "bpns"                          
#>  [49] "Brasem_IJM/MM"                  "BristolChannelArray"           
#>  [51] "BSTN"                           "BTN"                           
#>  [53] "BTN_LOST_ARRAY"                 "BTN-DeepWater-IMEDEA"          
#>  [55] "BTN-IMEDEA"                     "CANAPE"                        
#>  [57] "Carlingford"                    "CMAX_Hebrides"                 
#>  [59] "COD_OG_DK_2023"                 "COD_OWF"                       
#>  [61] "Cod-connectivity"               "CODEVCO_fish_detectors"        
#>  [63] "COLAGANG"                       "CONNECT-MED"                   
#>  [65] "Conon"                          "COREMAR"                       
#>  [67] "CORYTRACK"                      "cpodnetwork"                   
#>  [69] "Crab_behavior_aquaculture_Norw" "Csapidus_Southern_France"      
#>  [71] "CTN"                            "DAbecasis_PhD"                 
#>  [73] "DAERA_Elasmobranch_Network"     "DAK"                           
#>  [75] "Danish_southeastern_strait"     "Danish_Straits"                
#>  [77] "Danube_Sturgeons"               "DEHINC.HABI.GUACETO"           
#>  [79] "Delfzijl"                       "demer"                         
#>  [81] "Deveron"                        "dijle"                         
#>  [83] "Dijle_VPS"                      "DSM"                           
#>  [85] "DTU-Skjern"                     "DuskMaro"                      
#>  [87] "EBAMAR_array"                   "Eel_migration_Test_2023"

#>  [91] "eemskanaal_II"                  "eemskanaal_III"                
#>  [93] "EMFish_test"                    "EMMN"                          
#>  [95] "ESGL"                           "ETN_network_project_group_1"   
#>  [97] "ETN_network_project_group_2"    "ETN_network_project_group_3"

#> [103] "ETN_network_project_group_8"    "ETN_network_project_group_9"   
#> [105] "EUTN"                           "FarmTrack"                     
#> [107] "Finescale_Helgoland"            "Fish_Mig_Wad_Sea"              
#> [109] "FISHINTEL"                      "FISHOWF"                       
#> [111] "FISHOWF+"                       "FISP"                          
#> [113] "Foyle_Catchment"                "Friesland"                     
#> [115] "GIBRALTAR_STRAITS_COASTAL"      "GIBRALTAR_STRAITS_CURTAIN"
